title: pithecellobium scopulinum
intro: Pithecellobium scopulinum, also known as the Copal tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Pithecellobium scopulinum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
